ocr.text: In Table 1, the headers are "Compartment into which migration occurred" and "Rate of migration from indicated compartment"
with subheaders "T," "Blood," "EPb," and "VD." The row labeled "T" shows values of — for Blood, 19.23 for EPb, and 333.71
for VD, with 75.02. The "Blood" row presents values of 324.72 for T, — for Blood, 130.79 for EPb, and 26.31 for VD. The row
marked "EPb" indicates 216.22 for T, 1.00 for Blood, — for EPb, and 77.43 for VD.
